title: Root admin isento de bloqueio

RF-005.description: Usuários com isSuperAdmin=true são isentos: tentativas falhas não são contabilizadas e o bloqueio nunca é acionado para eles.

exemptionPoints.description: Lock check skipped entirely for superAdmin — isLocked never queried
Failed attempt NOT counted for superAdmin
Counter deletion also gated — superAdmin path skips entirely

existingTests.testName: lockout > Não deve bloquear usuário isSuperAdmin mesmo com 3 tentativas inválidas
verifies: 3 consecutive failed login attempts for isSuperAdmin=true user do NOT trigger lockout

notes: Implementation is correct and complete. The isSuperAdmin guard appears in two distinct code paths: (1) checkLockStatus returns null immediately — lock check never executed; (2) validatePasswordAndAuthenticate skips handleFailedAttempt call — increment never called. Both paths together guarantee RF-005 compliance.
